---
title: "Lecture "
subtitle: ""  
author: 
  - "Dave Armstrong"
date: ''
lang: en
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    seal: true
    mathjax: null
    css: 
      - default
      - xaringan-themer.css
      - www/layout.css
    includes:
      in_header: 
        - www/mathjax.html
    nature: 
      navigation:
        scroll: false
      slideNumberFormat: "%current%"
      highlightLanguage: r
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      ratio: 16:9
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
options(htmltools.dir.version = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width=6, fig.height=6, fig.retina=3,
  out.width = "100%",
  tidy=TRUE,  
  tidy.opts = list(only.comment=TRUE,  width.cutoff=80),
  cache = FALSE,
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE, 
  warning = FALSE,
  hiline = TRUE
)

```


```{r xaringan-themer, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(xaringanthemer)
library(DAslides)

pal3 <- okabe_ito_cols()[1:3]
pal2 <- okabe_ito_cols()[1:2]
xaringanExtra::use_fit_screen()
xaringanExtra::use_scribble(pen_color="#D86018", pen_size=5, 
    palette=c("#9A3324","#575294","#D86018", "#00274C", "#FFCB05"))
htmltools::tagList(
  xaringanExtra::use_clipboard(
    button_text = "<i class=\"fa fa-clipboard\"></i>",
    success_text = "<i class=\"fa fa-check\" style=\"color: #90BE6D\"></i>",
    error_text = "<i class=\"fa fa-times-circle\" style=\"color: #F94144\"></i>"
  ),
  rmarkdown::html_dependency_font_awesome()
)

style_duo_accent(
  # primary_color = okabe_ito_cols()[1], 
  # secondary_color = okabe_ito_cols()[2],
  primary_color = "#4f2683", 
  secondary_color = "#9182ae", 
  inverse_header_color = "#FFFFFF", 
  inverse_text_color = "#ffffff",
  # header_font_google = google_font("Source Sans 3", "600"),
  text_font_google   = google_font("Atkinson Hyperlegible", "300", "300i", "400", "400i", "500", "500i", 
                                   "600", "600i", "700", "700i", "800", "800i", "900", "900i", "1000", "1000i"),
  code_font_google = google_font("Source Code Pro", "300", "300i", "400", "400i", "500", "500i", "600", "600i", "700", "700i"), 
  colors = okabe_ito_cols()
)

library(ggplot2)
library(latex2exp)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

update_geom_defaults("line", list(linewidth = 1.1))
update_geom_defaults("path", list(linewidth = 1.1))
update_geom_defaults("point", list(size = 2.8))
update_geom_defaults("smooth", list(linewidth = 1.1))
```
